messages.content: translate 投资者范围和沟通时间
Investor scope and communication time.

translate 沟通时间建议放在7月初~7月中旬，主要基于以下考虑：
1）此时发审会已经通过，审核有了一定进展，能够督促投资者开始认真研究
2）网下投资者在交流时也会问到战配情况，6月底预计大部分战投已经确定，此时交流可以给予网下投资者更多信心
3）6月底承销团的分析师先给出初步估值区间，也可以协助与网下投资者的沟通
路演时间为期两周，涵盖北京（2天）、上海（2天）、深圳（2天）、广州（1天）的主要机构投资者

The suggested communication time is from early July to mid-July, mainly based on the following considerations:

1) At this time, the review meeting has already passed, and there has been some progress in the review, which can encourage investors to start studying seriously.

2) When communicating with offline investors, they will also inquire about the situation of the strategic investors. Most of the strategic investors are expected to be confirmed by the end of June, and this communication can provide more confidence to offline investors.

3) By the end of June, the underwriting analyst team will provide a preliminary valuation range, which can also assist in communication with offline investors.

The roadshow will last for two weeks, covering major institutional investors in Beijing (2 days), Shanghai (2 days), Shenzhen (2 days), and Guangzhou (1 day).

translate 管理层建议分为两队: 
一队凡荣总或焦总带队，杨林总和天威陪同，会见报价权重较大的中资机构投资者
另一队Erik和Chen带队，菲菲陪同，会见重要的外资QFII投资者，QFII投资者虽然报价权重较低，获得配售较少，但是后市买入的重要力量

The management team is recommended to be divided into two teams:

One team led by General Fan or General Jiao, accompanied by General Yang and General Tianwei, will meet with Chinese institutional investors with significant quote weights.

The other team led by Erik and Chen, accompanied by Feifei, will meet with important foreign QFII investors. Although QFII investors have lower quote weights and receive less allocation, they are an important force in the future buy-in market.
translate 总经理焦健
General Manager Jiao Jian.
translate 网下申购权重
Offline subscription weight.
translate 以近年来最大的主板IPO中国移动为例，询价对象家数超过1,000家，其中不到200家为专业机构投资者，剩余为一般法人和个人投资者。前50大投资者的申购量占比为67%，以大型公募基金和保险公司为主，是需要重点沟通的询价对象

Taking China Mobile, the largest Main Board IPO in recent years, as an example, there were more than 1,000 inquiry targets, of which less than 200 were professional institutional investors, and the rest were general legal entities and individual investors. The top 50 investors' subscription amounts accounted for 67%, mainly dominated by large public funds and insurance companies, which are the key inquiry targets that require focused communication.
translate 投资者报价权重分析
Analysis of Investor Quote Weight.
translate 占总申购量比例（%）
Percentage of Total Subscription Amount.
translate 管理层路演沟通覆盖前50大询价对象
Management roadshows cover the top 50 inquiry targets.

针对前50大报价权重较大、且专业能力较强的机构投资者，建议管理层实现全部覆盖，通过一对一路演充分交流投资价值。其中最为核心的【20】家机构投资者（申购量占比超50%），建议凡荣总或焦总带队拜访，随后核心的【50】家机构投资者（申购量占比超75%），可由中化和先正达的其他管理团队拜访沟通
为了让机构投资者对公司的科技属性和助农服务有更加直观的理解，公司也会在7月安排2个MAP和2个研发中心的参观调研，更生动的呈现先正达的投资价值
管理层路演同时，承销团的销售也会逐一覆盖50大投资者打新负责人，确保提前摸清其参与打新的价和量

For the top 50 institutional investors with significant quote weights and strong professional abilities, it is recommended that the management team achieve full coverage and communicate the investment value through one-on-one roadshows. Among them, the most core is the top 20 institutional investors (subscription amount accounting for over 50%), it is recommended that General Fan or General Jiao lead the team to visit, and then the core top 50 institutional investors (subscription amount accounting for over 75%) can be visited and communicated by other management teams of Sinochem and Syngenta.

In order to allow institutional investors to have a more intuitive understanding of the company's technology attributes and agricultural assistance services, the company will also arrange visits and research on two MAPs and two R&D centers in July, presenting the investment value of Syngenta more vividly.

At the same time as the management roadshow, the sales team of the underwriting syndicate will also cover the top 50 investment managers responsible for IPO allocations one by one to ensure that they understand their expected participation and allocation sizes in advance.

translate 针对前50大报价权重较大、且专业能力较强的机构投资者，建议管理层实现全部覆盖，通过一对一路演充分交流投资价值。其中最为核心的【20】家机构投资者（申购量占比超50%），建议凡荣总或焦总带队拜访，随后核心的【50】家机构投资者（申购量占比超75%），可由中化和先正达的其他管理团队拜访沟通
为了让机构投资者对公司的科技属性和助农服务有更加直观的理解，公司也会在7月安排2个MAP和2个研发中心的参观调研，更生动的呈现先正达的投资价值
管理层路演同时，承销团的销售也会逐一覆盖50大投资者打新负责人，确保提前摸清其参与打新的价和量

For the top 50 institutional investors with significant quote weights and strong professional capabilities, it is recommended that the management team achieve full coverage and communicate the investment value through one-on-one roadshows. Among them, the most core 20 institutional investors (subscription amount accounting for over 50%) are recommended to be visited by General Fan or General Jiao's team, and then the core top 50 institutional investors (subscription amount accounting for over 75%) can be visited and communicated by other management teams of Sinochem and Syngenta.

In order to allow institutional investors to have a more intuitive understanding of the company's technology attributes and agricultural assistance services, the company will also arrange visits and research on two MAPs and two R&D centers in July, presenting Syngenta's investment value more vividly.

At the same time as the management roadshow, the sales team of the underwriting syndicate will also cover the top 50 investment managers responsible for IPO allocations one by one to ensure that they understand their expected participation and allocation sizes in advance.
translate 询价机构沟通策略
Communication strategy with inquiry institutions.
translate 管理层路演同时，承销团的销售也会逐一覆盖50大投资者打新负责人，确保提前摸清其参与打新的价和量

While the management roadshow is underway, the sales team of the underwriting syndicate will also cover the top 50 investment managers responsible for IPO allocations one by one to ensure that they understand their expected participation and allocation sizes in advance.
translate 针对51~300大询价对象，由承销团的销售对打新负责人全部完成对接，坚定传递理想价格，实现掌控全盘

For the institutions ranked 51-300 in the inquiry list, the sales team of the underwriting syndicate will be responsible for connecting with all the responsible persons for IPO allocations and firmly conveying the ideal price to achieve overall control.
translate 充分利用公关渠道营造合理报价氛围，覆盖长尾投资人
Fully utilize public relations channels to create a reasonable pricing atmosphere and cover long-tail investors.
translate 在A股IPO中除主承销商通常会出具投价报告外，第三方媒体及机构经常在定价前发布其对新股发行价格的预测或报价建议，对于网下投资者的报价行为具有一定的影响力。由于300名之后的投资者主要为一般法人和个人投资者，因此该部分投资者主要通过公关渠道和银行的私人银行部来影响其报价决策

In A-share IPOs, in addition to the lead underwriter's pricing report, third-party media and institutions often release their predictions or pricing recommendations for the new share issue before pricing, which can have some influence on offline investors' bidding behavior. As investors ranked beyond 300 are mainly general legal entities and individual investors, these investors are mainly influenced by public relations channels and the private banking department of banks when making their bidding decisions.
translate 金融财关
Financial and Business Public Relations (PR).
abbreviation for continued
abbreviation for continued
translate 先正达集团在境内资本市场上市有利于国家粮食安全和农业现代化主动权
Syngenta Group's listing on the domestic capital market is conducive to the country's food security and the initiative of agricultural modernization.
translate 本次投资不但可以为助力中国农业发展做出重要贡献，也可以为贵公司带来良好的投资回报
This investment not only can contribute significantly to supporting the development of agriculture in China, but it can also bring good investment returns to your company.
translate 报低价没有入围
Submitting a low bid did not result in being shortlisted.
translate报价入围
Submitting a bid resulted in being shortlisted.

rephrase The recent 10 largest A-share IPOs of SOE all had positive IPO day performance and positive stock performance 30 days after the listing 
The average offline subscription and online subscription of the 10 IPOs are 78x and 273x respectively

In the recent 10 largest A-share IPOs of State-Owned Enterprises, all of them recorded positive IPO day performance and an upward trend in stock performance 30 days after the listing. 
These IPOs had an average offline subscription of 78 times and an online subscription of 273 times.
rephrase It is critical to give investors confidence about the IPO day performance and guide investors to fully understand the valuation upsides
To instill investor confidence in IPO day performance and to provide guidance on understanding the potential valuation growth are both crucial factors.
rephrase IPO PMs are measured by their successful rate of bidding, so it is critical to guide investors to ensure their bid prices are high enough
The success rate of IPO PMs is measured by the success rates of their bids. Therefore, it is crucial to provide guidance to investors to ensure that their bid prices are sufficiently high.
rephrase IPO Performance of Comparable Deals in History
Historical IPO performances for comparable deals.
